headline: Reclaim 90 minutes of your day, daily
primary_text:
You spend 15+ hours per week on documentation. That's not sustainable.

A recent survey found that 40% of clinicians report burnout from paperwork alone — not the emotional labor of the work itself, but the administrative burden that comes after.

JotPsych cuts documentation time by 1-2 hours per day with AI-powered clinical notes from your session recordings. HIPAA-compliant. Built specifically for behavioral health.

Your clients need you present in session, not drowning in notes after hours.
